creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
Created attachment 222673
Make flavorized ports working with user defined WRKDIRPREFIX

https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/#porting-dads mentions in chapter 13.3. that WRKDIRPREFIX must be honored.

This was broken with the FLAVOR introduction long time ago.
The attached patch fixes it for me.
